creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
On 12-CURRENT.

Zeitgeist has been failing to build for some time due to dbus.
Log DOES NOT show package py27-dbus-1.2.0_1 being installed.

From Poudriere:
checking pkg-config is at least version 0.9.0... yes
checking for ZEITGEIST... yes
checking for DEE_ICU... yes
checking for DBUS_MODULE... no
configure: error: Package requirements ("dbus-1") were not met:

Package 'dbus-1', required by 'virtual:world', not found
